name: outside-click
title: Outside Click
description: Detect clicks outside a referenced element. Useful for closing dropdowns, popovers, and modals when the user clicks elsewhere.

docs.description: Detect clicks outside a referenced element. Useful for closing dropdowns, popovers, and modals when the user clicks elsewhere.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Ref to the element that defines the 'inside' boundary. Clicks outside this element trigger the handler.

parameters.name: handler
parameters.description: Called when a click occurs outside the referenced element.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether the listener is active. Defaults to true. Set to false to temporarily disable detection.

parameters.name: excludeRefs
parameters.description: Additional refs to exclude from outside-click detection. Clicks on elements within these refs will not trigger the handler. Useful for excluding trigger elements when content renders in a portal.

returns.description: This hook does not return a value. It attaches and cleans up a mousedown event listener.

notes.title: Event Type
notes.content: Uses mousedown (not click) to detect outside interactions before the click completes. This prevents edge cases where the target element is removed before the click event fires.

notes.title: Used By
notes.content: Built into PopoverContent for dismiss-on-outside-click behavior.

content.text: font-mono text-sm border border-border px-3 py-1.5 bg-background hover:bg-muted transition-colors
w-64 border border-border bg-muted p-4 font-mono text-sm
This panel closes when you click outside it.
